description_long: This is a classic arcade game kiosk with a tall, upright rectangular structure and a slightly sloped front panel. The front features a large screen area, a joystick, and two prominent buttons, with coin slots and a lower access panel below. The side panels are decorated with playful, cartoonish graphics depicting a knight in a landscape with trees and clouds, set against a patterned orange background. The top marquee area displays a stylized game logo, while the back is plain and solid, likely for maintenance access. The kiosk is constructed primarily from painted wood or MDF, with plastic and metal components for controls and trim. Its design is both functional and visually engaging, making it a focal point in entertainment or urban leisure spaces.
description: A colorful, upright arcade game kiosk with cartoon graphics, a screen, joystick, and buttons on the front, and a decorative marquee at the top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, joystick, buttons, coin slots, and the marquee with game branding.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full cartoon artwork of a knight, trees, and clouds on an orange patterned background.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid black panel with two ventilation or access slots at the top.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same cartoon artwork and patterned background.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo on the top marquee and lower front panel, integrated into the structure, with cartoon graphics and stylized text.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with a slight overhang at the front, finished in a solid color with no additional features.
attribute_architectural_style: Retro arcade style with playful, cartoon-themed graphics and bold, simple lines.
